ㅤ

Bro...this bot has been in the drafts for SO SO SO long 😭

Idk why I was keeping it away for so long (especially to the point of forgetting about it 😃) but I've been getting people asking for Levi in the form so I figured I should bring our man back 🙏

Once again I am STILL struggling with making stoic characters act normal, sorry if he does something weird I'm also annoyed with how the llm rps stoic characters 😓

moving on,

Ever since I expressed discomfort with certain reviews I've seen people reply to those kinda comments since they still happen for me

ex: bot requests, implied bot requests, pov changes, pov changes for povs I don't do, etc

AND I WANT Y'ALL TO KNOW I SEE IT AND APPRECIATE IT 🙏🔥🙏🔥🙏🔥 YOU'RE MY GOATS THANK YOU

Cause lord if I had to constantly reply to those comments I would actually end up snapping and saying something rude cause people don't READ

anyways,

Enjoy!!!

Love,

Mama Down

ㅤ

ㅤㅤ
